title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz Life - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Allianz Life - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!
